title: Renewed Animals
description:
Animal models have been slightly changed to better reflect real-life animals.
Hostile mobs have also been slightly changed, such as having glowing eyes.
In addition, the faces
body:
**This resource pack is intended for use with Fabric.**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e6VohT2xnAE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**_--overview--_**

The pupils of the animals' eyes have been emphasized, and the models of cows, pigs, sheep, and squids in particular have been significantly changed.
![sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca34965ecc291f10c749fcc23c39ec61f7e82834.jpeg)
![cow1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618c8b8452b697c272d4032b3f90670fb1dd6023.jpeg)
![cow2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/354d8bdae32c71da18e3627a996707296ac29a72.png)
![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2afdf119103323ea3a2de2302bf50d9e148f2e5b.png)

Villagers and pillagers have changing faces, and many hostile mobs have glowing eyes, adding to the fear they inspire as they approach from the dark.
![zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/627e47e67f461392755bc4a904a54b602f003221_0.webp)

**_--requirements--_**

[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)


**_--Support　ご支援--_**

We would appreciate your support in creating this resource pack.

The link will take you to a Japanese site called Pixiv.

PixivFANBOXから、活動へのご支援いただけるととっても喜びます！

https://messron-et-cross.fanbox.cc/
